# User Preferences

@dynatrace-sdk/user-preferences

## 1.1.4

### Patch Changes

- `getTimezone`, `getLanguage`, `getRegionalFormat`, and `getTheme`, no longer log the warning about missing runtime functions, when used in serverless functions.

## 1.1.3

### Patch Changes

- Fixed code examples in JSDoc for exported methods. (APPDEV-13971)

## 1.1.2

### Patch Changes

- Added code examples in JSDoc for exported methods. (APPDEV-13405)

## 1.1.1

### Patch Changes

- web runtime name updated in console logs and errors.

## 1.1.0

### Minor Changes

- Add getTimezone method to retrieve the user preferred timezone

### Patch Changes

- Update documentation

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- Initial public release.
